parameters.content:
~# docker exec -it n8n_core sh
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing
clear the flag manually
(wsl)

nodes.name: Execute Command
nodes.notes: Unlimited time, only check for .done., exclude temp_input_course.wav

parameters.command:
=SOURCE="{{ $json.filePath }}"
if [ ! -f "$SOURCE" ]; then
  echo "ERROR: Source file does not exist $SOURCE"
  exit 1
fi
if [ -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing ]; then
  AGE=$(find /root/.n8n-files/.processing -mmin +180 | wc -l)
  if [ "$AGE" -gt 0 ]; then
    rm -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing
    echo "Old flag timed out and cleared, continuing execution"
  else
    echo "BUSY"
    exit 0
  fi
fi
touch /root/.n8n-files/.processing
mkdir -p /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks
cp "$SOURCE" /root/.n8n-files/temp_input_course.wav
if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  rm -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing
  echo "ERROR: Copy failed"
  exit 1
fi
mv "$SOURCE" "${SOURCE}.done"
echo "OK"

nodes.name: Copy Audio File to Safe Zone 1
nodes.notes: Failsafe version: Check source exists -> flag check -> copy -> mark done, auto-clear flag on failure

nodes.name: Code in JavaScript
nodes.notes: Use exitCode for judgment, more stable than string comparison

parameters.command:
INPUT="/root/.n8n-files/temp_input_course.wav"
if [ ! -f "$INPUT" ]; then echo "ERROR: temp_input_course.wav does not exist"; exit 1; fi
ffmpeg -y -i "$INPUT" -f segment -segment_time 600 -c:a pcm_s16le /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_%03d.wav 2>&1 | tail -3
echo "FFmpeg completed"

sync && FILE_COUNT=$(ls /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_*.wav 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
if [ "$FILE_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then echo "ERROR: No chunks generated"; exit 1; fi
echo "Chunking completed, total $FILE_COUNT"
ls -lh /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_*.wav

values.content:
=You are a professional course teaching assistant. Please help me organize a structured summary based on the following course transcript, and create quiz questions to force active recall (15 multiple-choice questions, 5 short-answer questions), providing reference answers and brief explanations at the end.

**Content:**
{{ $('Combine Full Transcript').item.json.fullText }}

Please output in Traditional Chinese with Taiwanese terminology, and use Markdown for elegant formatting (e.g., headings, bold text, bullet points).

Special Note: Because these notes will be sent via Gmail, and Gmail does not support LaTeX mathematical rendering.
Absolutely DO NOT use the $ symbol to wrap formulas.
Please use plain text for all mathematical expressions (e.g., use ^ for powers, sqrt for square roots, / for fractions) to ensure clear readability in an email environment that does not support math formatting.

parameters.subject: =📚 {{ $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.body.category }} Course Notes - {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
parameters.message:
=

📚 {{ $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.body.category }} Course Notes

Recording Time: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') }}

{{ $json.data }}

parameters.command:
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_*.wav
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_*.m4a
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/temp_input_course.wav
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing
echo "Cleanup completed (General Course)"

nodes.name: Clear Temp Files
nodes.notes: General course workflow finished, clear all temp files + flag

values.content:
=You are a professional meeting recording assistant. Please organize a clearly structured meeting minutes document based on the following meeting transcript.

[Important Note]
This transcript was generated by AI speech recognition and may contain minor recognition errors or repeated phrases. Please use your judgment to filter out meaningless content and focus on the substantive discussion.

Please output in the following format, using Markdown:

---

## 📋 Basic Information
- **Meeting Name**: {{ $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.body.category }}
- **Date**: {{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}
- **Meeting Purpose**: (Determine from transcript)

---

## 🎯 Discussion Highlights
(List the main topics discussed, specifically noting any dissenting opinions or debates)

---

## ⚖️ Key Reasons / Trade-offs
(Various viewpoints and the reasons for choosing a particular direction)

---

## 💡 Perspectives Influencing Future Decisions
(Which ideas or information will guide the upcoming direction)

---

## ✅ Resolutions
(Explicitly list what was finally decided, using bullet points)

---

## 📌 Action Items
| Assignee | Task | Deadline |
|--------|---------|------|
(If the transcript does not explicitly mention the assignee or deadline, fill in 'TBD')

---

## 📅 Next Meeting Schedule
(Fill in if mentioned, otherwise write 'Unscheduled')

---

## 🗒️ Additional Notes
(Other information worth recording but not categorized)

---

> Meeting Minutes = Decisions + Actions + Responsibilities

Please output in Traditional Chinese with Taiwanese terminology. DO NOT use the $ symbol to wrap any content.

[Transcript Content]:
{{ $('Combine Full Transcript').item.json.fullText }}

parameters.command:
=CATEGORY="{{ $('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.body.category }}"
mkdir -p "/data/obsidian_vault/會議/${CATEGORY}" && cat > "/data/obsidian_vault/會議/${CATEGORY}/Meeting_Minutes_{{ $now.format('yyyy-MM-dd_HHmm') }}.md" <<'OBSEOF'
{{ $json.content.parts[0].text }}
OBSEOF

rm -f /root/.n8n-files/temp_chunks/part_*.wav
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/temp_input_course.wav
rm -f /root/.n8n-files/.processing
echo "Cleanup completed (Meeting workflow)"

nodes.name: Clear Temp Files_Meeting
nodes.notes: Meeting workflow finished, clear temp files + flag
